<!-- Title: use gitmoji when possible / 标题建议使用 gitmoji:
✨ Feature / 🐛 Bugfix / ♻️ Refactor / 🎨 UI / ⚡️ Perf / 🔒 Security / 🔧 Chore / ✅ Tests / 📄 Docs
Existing conventional prefixes such as feat:, fix:, docs:, chore: are also acceptable.
-->

## Summary / 变更说明

<!-- What changed and why? / 简述改动内容与动机 -->

## Related Issue / 关联 Issue

Closes #

## Screenshots / 截图

<!-- Required for UI changes. / UI 改动请附截图或短视频 -->

## Testing / 验证

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml`
- [ ] `npm run package:portable` if packaging or release behavior changed

## Checklist / 自检

- [ ] The change is focused and does not include unrelated formatting churn.
- [ ] User-facing text is updated in both Chinese and English when applicable.
- [ ] Screenshots or notes are included for UI/OCR behavior changes.
- [ ] Logs, screenshots, and sample data are redacted before sharing.
